sections.h2: What Is Convert1s Online Video Converter?
p: Convert1s is a powerful online video converter that allows you to convert video to MP4 or convert video to MP3 quickly and download files directly to your device.
This online video converter supports multiple platforms including YouTube, TikTok, Facebook and Instagram so users can download videos using a simple link.

sections.h2: How to Convert Video to MP4 or MP3

p: Copy the link from YouTube, TikTok, Facebook or Instagram that you want to convert.
Paste the link into the Convert1s online video converter input box.
Select the format you want such as convert video to MP4 for video or convert video to MP3 for audio.
Click convert and download the video or audio file instantly.
Convert1s works as a YouTube video downloader that allows you to download YouTube videos online.
You can also use the YouTube to MP3 converter or YouTube to MP4 converter to extract audio or video from any YouTube link.
Our TikTok downloader lets you download TikTok videos easily.
Use the TikTok downloader without watermark feature to save videos without the TikTok logo.
Convert1s also works as a Facebook video downloader that allows you to download Facebook video content quickly.
Simply paste the link to download Facebook video or Facebook reels directly to your device.
Download Instagram videos using our Instagram video downloader.
You can also save Instagram reels or use the Instagram story downloader to download stories and reels.
Convert1s combines a video downloader and online video converter into one simple tool.

ul.h3: Convert Video to MP4 or MP3 Easily
p: Users can convert video to MP4 for offline viewing or convert video to MP3 to extract audio.
Download unlimited videos from YouTube, TikTok, Facebook and Instagram without registration.
The online video converter works on desktop, tablet and mobile devices directly from the browser.
Yes. Convert1s is a free online video converter that allows unlimited downloads.
The converter supports YouTube video downloader, TikTok downloader, Facebook video downloader and Instagram video downloader features.

ul.h3: Can I convert video to MP3?
p: Yes. The tool includes a YouTube to MP3 converter and allows you to convert video to MP3 easily.
